title: SMB Message Signing Disabled
description: SMB message signing is disabled on the target. This allows attackers to perform man-in-the-middle attacks, relay authentication, and potentially gain unauthorized access to network resources.
evidence: nmap smb-security-mode script: message_signing: disabled (dangerous, but default)
remediation: Enable SMB message signing on the Samba server by setting 'server signing = mandatory' in smb.conf
